prestazioni: VQ37VHR (3.7L V6) engine: Full bolt-on forced induction kit utilizing a Garrett GTX3582R turbocharger (0.82 A/R, 62mm inducer) with a custom 3.5-inch stainless steel turbo-back exhaust featuring a Tomei 70mm titanium tip and a GReddy Profec B Spec II boost controller for precise 18 psi mapping, paired with a Koyorad 40mm core front-mount intercooler and a custom 3-inch silicone intake piping system from HKS Super Power Flow.

VQ37VHR-specific engine internals upgrade: Forged JE Pistons (9.0:1 compression, 95.5mm bore) with Manley H-beam connecting rods, ACL Race Series main and rod bearings, and a Tomei Type-S 264°/260° camshaft set with Tomei adjustable cam gears, all paired with an HKS 260-lph fuel pump and ID1000x injectors for E85 compatibility.

Chassis and drivetrain reinforcement: Cusco Type-RS 2-way adjustable LSD with 4.625 final drive ratio, Nismo 4-piston front and 2-piston rear brake calipers with DBA 5000 Series rotors (355mm front, 330mm rear), and a full Wisefab Motorsport front and rear suspension kit featuring adjustable camber plates, polyurethane bushings, and custom-valved Öhlins Road & Track coilovers with 8kg/mm front and 7kg/mm rear springs.
estetica: Liberty Walk LB Works widebody conversion kit (Q70L-specific, 50mm front and 70mm rear fender flares) with custom carbon fiber side skirts and a Seibon carbon fiber hood featuring a 30mm vented scoop for the VQ37VHR intercooler piping.

Custom 3M Matte Pearl White wrap with gloss black accents on the roof, mirrors, and lower body cladding, paired with a Rocket Bunny V3 rear diffuser and a custom front splitter from Vertex Japan, both in raw carbon fiber with integrated LED turn signals.

Interior overhaul featuring Recaro SP-G (Kazuki-spec) front seats with custom red Alcantara upholstery, a Nismo 380mm steering wheel with a suede grip, and a full Takata Drift II 4-point harness setup, complemented by a custom roll cage from AutoPower Industries with a bolt-in design for the Q70L chassis.
